name: Chicken & Zucchini Soup
recipeIngredient: 3 Parsley sprigs plus 1/4 cup parsley -- chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the chicken in a 6-quart pot.
2. Add all ingredients through the parsnip, including the parsley sprigs, lemon slice, peppercorns, and salt.
3. Add the chicken stock and enough water to cover the chicken by 2 inches.
4. Heat to boiling, skimming any residue as it gathers.
5. Reduce heat and simmer, partially covered, for 1 hour.
6. Remove the chicken from the stock and let cool enough to handle.
7. Carefully remove the meat from the bones and cut into bite-size pieces. Cover and reserve.
8. Return the bones and skin to the stock. Return it to a boil; reduce heat and simmer, uncovered, for 45 minutes.
9. Strain the stock into another pot, pressing vegetables gently with the back of a spoon to release juices.
10. In a lightly oiled heavy skillet, sauté sausage pieces until well browned (about 8 minutes). Drain on paper towels.
11. Add the sausages to the stock and heat to boiling.
12. Reduce heat; simmer uncovered, skimming any fat that rises to the surface for 20 minutes.
13. Add the pasta shells; cook 10 more minutes.
14. Add the zucchini and reserved chicken; cook an additional 5 minutes.
15. Season with salt and pepper to taste and sprinkle with chopped parsley.
